description_long: This object is a cylindrical canister with a white body and a green band near the top, featuring the Herbalife brand. The canister is topped with a white lid and is placed on a wooden surface. The front label displays the product name 'Specialized Protein Powder' along with branding and some decorative graphics, including stylized orange and beige lines. The sides and back of the canister are covered with detailed text, likely nutritional information and usage instructions, printed in black on a white background. The canister appears to be made of plastic, with a paper or plastic label wrapped around it. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for a health food or supplement product.
description: A white cylindrical Herbalife canister with a green band and detailed labeling, topped with a white lid and placed on a wooden surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Herbalife logo, green band, and product name 'Specialized Protein Powder' with decorative graphics.
description_view_1: Side view displaying stylized orange and beige lines and partial product information, with less text visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by dense black text on a white background, likely nutritional and ingredient information.
description_view_3: Back-side view with more detailed labeling and a barcode, showing the canister's full wrap-around label.
attribute_brand_logo: A green Herbalife logo is visible on the front label, located near the top of the canister, featuring a leaf symbol and the word 'HERBALIFE' in white.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Yes, nutritional information and ingredient labeling are visible on the back and sides of the canister in black text.
